---
name: Bug report
about: Something on the Talio site is broken, wrong, or misleading
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A short description. Example: "Profile modal shows me as a mod, but I am not a mod."

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open https://nous-community-expert-dev.pages.dev/
2. Click / type / navigate ...
3. See the wrong thing

## What I expected

The correct behavior.

## Screenshots

If it is a visual bug, paste a screenshot or link to one. The user profile page in particular: please include the username so we can look up the data.

## Build info

The footer of the page shows the version. Copy it here:

- VERSION:
- BUILD:
- COMMIT:
- BRANCH:

## What is the source of truth

Talio is a static site built from a Discord archive. If the bug is about
a number, badge, or title being wrong, the data comes from the upstream
Discord archive. The most recent commit to that archive is the source
of truth for what should be on the site.

## Optional

- Browser + version (Chrome 120, Firefox 121, etc.)
- Device (desktop, mobile, etc.)
- Anything else that might be relevant
